{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260321130108B00F24F01AE4F6885845\"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7601341163174183742","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这部《大清国》称得上是一部诚意满满的佳作！作者对清代历史细节的考究，字里行间尽是对那个时代的精准描摹。剧情层层铺垫中暗藏朝堂权谋的波谲云诡，作者扎实的笔力与创作巧思，实属一部值得细品的历史小说！","text_exts":[{"e":96,"s":92,"text":"历史小说","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44\u0026hyperlink_type=quote_book\u0026directQueryWord=%E5%8E%86%E5%8F%B2%E5%B0%8F%E8%AF%B4\u0026directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774069269F6885845%230%23%23\u0026directTabType=0\u0026reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227601341163174183742%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227600783420553169944%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%8E%86%E5%8F%B2%E5%B0%8F%E8%AF%B4%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D\u0026halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769828603,"group_id":"7600783420553169944","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N58QuNbiAeM0qc7k/jMn9HJogRtK1Ms7/aCtr4OC/ck0","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2265443341710445","user_name":"🐝悦小悦🌻"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2265443341710445","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7600783420553169944","book_info":{"abstract":"一部讲述大清王朝三百年兴亡始末的史书。\n全景再现清朝的政治、军事与社会变迁，深度解析中国最后一个封建王朝的辉煌与沉沦。","audio_thumb_uri":
